## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `sbt ci` passes locally (lint, format, cross-build, tests)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in Scaladoc, and `sbt +doc` produces no warnings
